name: labelman-blip
description: Caption images using a BLIP HTTP endpoint. Returns per-image captions as JSON lines.

inputs.name: BLIP endpoint URL
inputs.description: HTTP endpoint that accepts image uploads and returns captions.

inputs.name: Prompt or question
inputs.description: Optional prompt or question for VQA-style captioning.

inputs.name: Image file paths
inputs.description: One or more image file paths to caption.
